enjoy & have fun

addons.name: ShoyruClassicCP
addons.title: Shoyru's Classic CP
addons.description:
Update 50 replaced the Champion Point display on PvP target frames with the new Veterancy rank icon. 

When you target another player in Cyrodiil, Imperial City, or Battlegrounds, you now see their seasonal Veterancy rank instead of their CP — which tells you how much they've played this season, not how strong they are.

This addon reverts that change. Target frames show the classic champion starâ€¦

addons.name: ShoyruCrosshair
addons.title: Shoyru's Combat Reticle
addons.description: A clean custom crosshair plus a fully configurable hitmarker. Design your own reticle (lines, center dot, colors, outline, opacity) and get instant hit feedback: flash a hitmarker on crits only or on all damage, pick its style (adjustable cross or an X), set normal/crit colors, hold time, and a built-in sound with adjustable intensity. Everything is saved in named profiles you can switch on the fly. Type /reticle to configure.

addons.name: AnimeWaifu
addons.title: Anime Waifu
addons.description: Hitmarker + waifu image + sound whenever you land critical damage.
